name: Analog OneSync
description:
OneSync lets you sync notifications across your devices in real-time. Receive important alerts from one device directly on another — seamlessly.

Features
- 🔄 Real-time notification sync
-📱 Multi-device support
- 🌐 Web app to receive notifications on desktop
- 🎯 App-level filtering (choose which apps to sync)
- 🔐 Google Sign-In authentication
-⚡ Lightweight and fast
author: one-dhiraj
